message.content:
@startuml
title FragmentVideoChat Sequence Diagram

participant "FragmentVideoChat" as FVC
participant "LicodeConnector" as LC
participant "PeerConnectionFactory\nFactory" as PCF
participant "RoomObserver" as RObs
participant "MediaStream" as MS
participant "PeerConnection" as PConn
participant "StreamDescription" as SDesc
participant "LicodeSdpObserver" as LSdpo
participant "LicodeServer" as LServ
participant "SocketIOClient" as SIOC


== Init ==
activate FVC
    note over FVC : configureConnector
    
    activate LC 
        init ->>PCF:init
        
        addObseverer(RoomObsrever) -->RObs:initializeAndroidGlobals    
        
    deactivate LC  
deactivate FVC 

group Publish 
    
   startCastView.onClick-->LC:requestPublish
   
   
     triggerPubishAllowed<--LServ:onPublishAllwoed
     
     
      doPublish->MS:startPublish
      
      
       makeVideoview<-FVC:pulbish(VideoStreamsView)       
end group 


group  publish-create media
  
 createLocalMediastream <-LC:createMediaConstraints
 
 getvideoCapturer <--createVideoSource(videoCapture.MediaConstraint):getvideocaptuer 
 
 createtrackstring(videosource)<-addtrack:addTrack()
 
 createsaudiosources(Mediaconstraint)->createtAudioTracks(string,Audiosource):addtracks 
  
 end group  

group publis -Create offer  
  
makePcconstraints <---setmedia:setlocaldescription

initRemote(Peerconnection,Sdoobserver)-->:oncreatesuccess



sendSDPSocket("publish")<----onsesucccess:Lserv




endsubscribe success ---> setremotedescription:Pconn  


end group 



@enduml
